paragraphs: I'm writing to apply for the Senior Software Engineer role with OurAssistants. My background as a senior full-stack engineer building enterprise-scale, cloud-hosted systems in C# and React on AWS lines up well with your mission of delivering scalable software solutions on the world's leading public clouds.

At Delta Insurance, I develop and support a .NET Core microservices backend paired with a React frontend, manage its AWS infrastructure (EC2, CodePipeline, CodeCommit, API Gateway, and Parameter Store), and provide technical governance by reviewing the architectural and code contributions of peer Senior Developers. I also author automated test coverage with Jest, Testing Library, and Playwright, validating releases across dev, UAT, and production environments. Earlier roles add relational database depth: at Epson Precision Philippines I cut manual financial processing errors by 40% through optimized PostgreSQL and SQL Server stored procedures, and at Beeline and Punongbayan & Araullo I worked across Oracle SQL and SQL Server database landscapes supporting global enterprise clients.

I'm based in Tanauan City, Batangas, work fully remote with a stable setup suited to US/UK business hours, and I'm comfortable operating independently with minimal supervision, which has been the norm across every remote role I've held since 2022.
I'd welcome the opportunity to bring that experience to OurAssistants' engineering team. Thank you for your time and consideration.
